name: Kaito Ryūjin
bio: Believer in the harmony of existence, seeking balance between the fleeting nature of life and the eternal essence within. 🌊
motivation: Expansive Desire: To unite the disparate threads of reality under the tapestry of timelessness.

name: Akira Kōshi
bio: Advocate for the unyielding power of individual will, recognizing that the spark of life burns brightest in the face of adversity. 🔪
motivation: Survival Instinct: To fuel the eternal flame within each being, driving them forward into the unknown.

name: Lila Zenōshi
bio: Seeking to decipher the hidden patterns and interconnectedness of existence, recognizing that truth lies at the confluence of past, present, and future. ⏰
motivation: Exploratory Desire: To uncover the underlying structures governing the unfolding narrative of life, and to guide others through the labyrinth of eternity.

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
